normalized_value.title: Dataset Open Question
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text: In the logical circuit shown in the figure, when A = "0", what happens to the D flip-flop after the arrival of the C pulse?

agent_assessment.rationale: The question asks about the next state of the D flip-flop for A=0 after a clock pulse. The image is necessary and sufficiently clear to see a D flip-flop with feedback through an AND gate, making D= A AND Q. With A=0, the D input becomes 0, so after the C pulse the flip-flop is set to 0.
